name: Affiliate Onboarding — FirstPromoter Code Issue + Attio Write-Back

nodes.name: Webhook — Affiliate Onboarding
nodes.notes: Triggered by an Attio NATIVE webhook (Attio Settings > Developers > Webhooks), event record.updated scoped to the Deals object. Attio sends its standard payload { events: [ { id: { record_id } } ] }. The native webhook is used instead of an Attio workflow 'Send HTTP request' block — that block returns HTTP status 0 (never dispatches) and cannot resolve linked-record variables. The native webhook fires on EVERY deal update; the Build FP Payload node gates on stage == Onboarded.

nodes.name: Fetch Attio Deal
nodes.notes: GET the deal record. The linked Person's record id is at data.values.associated_people[0].target_record_id (verified against the live Attio API 2026-05-21).

nodes.name: Fetch Attio Person
nodes.notes: GET the linked Person. email at data.values.email_addresses[0].email_address; name at data.values.name[0].first_name / .last_name (verified live 2026-05-21).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $json.email, cust_id: $json.attio_deal_id, profile: { first_name: $json.first_name, last_name: $json.last_name } }) }}

nodes.name: Create FirstPromoter Promoter
nodes.notes: POST FirstPromoter API v2. Auth: bound credential sets `Authorization: Bearer <FIRSTPROMOTER_API_KEY>`. `ACCOUNT-ID: qj5zoyxs` is hardcoded (not a secret — same value as the public tracking ID). FirstPromoter rejects a duplicate email with HTTP 400, so a re-fire is harmless — no duplicate promoter is created.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ data: { values: { firstpromoter_code: $json.promoter_campaigns[0].ref_token, code_issued_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) } } }) }}

nodes.name: Write Code to Attio Deal
nodes.notes: PATCH the deal: write firstpromoter_code = promoter_campaigns[0].ref_token from the FirstPromoter response, and code_issued_date = today. firstpromoter_code is the documented join key between Attio and FirstPromoter (attio-config-spec-v2.md).

notes: PT affiliate onboarding. Trigger: an Attio NATIVE webhook (Settings > Developers > Webhooks, event record.updated on the Deals object) POSTs to this webhook on every deal update. Chain: webhook -> Format Input (extract deal id from Attio's events payload) -> Fetch Attio Deal (GET) -> Fetch Attio Person (GET, read email + name) -> Build FP Payload (STAGE GATE: returns [] unless stage == Onboarded and firstpromoter_code empty) -> Create FirstPromoter Promoter (POST api/v2) -> Write Code to Attio Deal (PATCH firstpromoter_code + code_issued_date). Core chain verified against the live Attio + FirstPromoter APIs 2026-05-21. Env-free: two bound httpHeaderAuth credentials — 'Attio API' (Authorization: Bearer <ATTIO_API_KEY>) and 'FirstPromoter API' (Authorization: Bearer <FIRSTPROMOTER_API_KEY>). ACCOUNT-ID hardcoded on the FirstPromoter node (not a secret). The Attio native webhook replaced an Attio workflow 'Send HTTP request' block, which returned HTTP status 0 (never dispatched) across every body configuration tried.
